RULING:
Stipulation reached by the parties. PLAINTIFF RALPH BRIGNONE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL: GRANTED under 473(b) CCP; Plaintiff's counsel shall pay the City $750.00 to the Defendant City and County of San Francisco. Plaintiff will voluntarily dismiss without prejudice this action. Order signed. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
